title: batatas glaberrima
intro: Batatas glaberrima, also known as African yam, is a plant species in the Dioscoreaceae family, native to West Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Batatas glaberrima include the reduction of blood pressure, improvement of diabetes management, and the enhancement of immune function. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional cooking and food preparation.
